records.question: What storms named One have a maximum speed of exactly 995 and caused no more than 13 million dollars in damage?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT storm.storm_id FROM storm
JOIN affected_region ON storm.storm_id = affected_region.storm_id
WHERE storm.damage_millions_usd <= 13.0 AND storm.max_speed = 995 AND storm.name = 'One'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT storm.storm_id
FROM storm
WHERE storm.name = 'One' AND storm.max_speed = 995 AND storm.damage_millions_usd <= 13

records.question: Which storms named One caused at least 13.0 million USD in damage with zero deaths, had a max speed of at most 995, and affected the region where region_name is Afghanistan and region_code is AF?

SELECT storm.storm_id FROM storm
JOIN affected_region ON storm.storm_id = affected_region.storm_id
JOIN region ON affected_region.region_id = region.region_id
WHERE storm.damage_millions_usd >= 13.0 AND region.region_name = 'Afghanistan' AND storm.number_deaths = 0 AND storm.name = 'One' AND storm.max_speed <= 995 AND region.region_code = 'AF'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT s.storm_id
FROM storm s
JOIN affected_region ar ON s.storm_id = ar.storm_id
JOIN region r ON ar.region_id = r.region_id
WHERE s.name = 'One'
  AND s.damage_millions_usd >= 13.0
  AND s.number_deaths = 0
  AND s.max_speed <= 995
  AND r.region_name = 'Afghanistan'
  AND r.region_code = 'AF'
